summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 'Notify me when available' feature for booked/on-hold slots. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%), all frontend UI components working correctly. The notification flow (subscribe -> booking cancel -> notification trigger) is fully functional.
passed_tests: POST /api/notifications/subscribe - subscribing to slot notification (200 OK)
POST /api/notifications/subscribe - duplicate subscription returns 'Already subscribed'
POST /api/notifications/subscribe - requires authentication (401)
DELETE /api/notifications/subscribe - unsubscribing from slot notification (200 OK)
DELETE /api/notifications/subscribe - unsubscribe non-existent returns 'removed: false'
GET /api/notifications - listing user notifications (array returned)
GET /api/notifications - requires authentication (401)
GET /api/notifications/unread-count - returns count field
GET /api/notifications/unread-count - requires authentication (401)
PUT /api/notifications/{id}/read - marks single notification as read
PUT /api/notifications/{id}/read - non-existent notification handled gracefully
PUT /api/notifications/read-all - marks all notifications as read, unread count becomes 0
GET /api/notifications/subscriptions - returns user's active subscriptions
GET /api/notifications/subscriptions - filter by venue_id works
GET /api/notifications/subscriptions - filter by date works
POST /api/bookings/{id}/cancel - triggers notifications for subscribed users
Frontend: Bell icon in navbar displays unread count badge
Frontend: Notification panel opens on bell click
Frontend: Notification items display title, message, timestamp
Frontend: 'Mark all read' button clears badge
Frontend: Clicking notification navigates to venue detail
Frontend: 'Notify Me' button appears on booked slots in VenueDetail
Frontend: Clicking 'Notify Me' changes button to 'Watching' state
Frontend: Clicking 'Watching' toggles back to 'Notify Me' (unsubscribe)
Frontend: Toast notifications display on subscribe/unsubscribe
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created test subscriptions and bookings which were cleaned up after tests. Notification subscriptions use 'notification_subscriptions' collection, notifications use 'notifications' collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notification feature fully implemented and tested. Key components: 1) Backend routes in server.py lines 903-1021, 2) Frontend Navbar.js lines 26-73 for bell/panel, 3) VenueDetail.js lines 163-195 for Notify Me button. Two MongoDB collections used: 'notifications' and 'notification_subscriptions'. Notification polling interval is 10 seconds in frontend.

feature_verification.notify_me_button_on_booked_slots: VERIFIED - Shows on slots with status 'booked' or 'on_hold'
feature_verification.bell_icon_with_badge: VERIFIED - Badge shows unread count, hides when count is 0
feature_verification.notification_panel: VERIFIED - Opens on click, shows notifications list with timestamps
feature_verification.mark_all_read: VERIFIED - Clears all unread and removes badge
feature_verification.subscribe_unsubscribe_toggle: VERIFIED - Button toggles between 'Notify Me' and 'Watching'
feature_verification.cancel_booking_triggers_notification: VERIFIED - Cancelling booking creates slot_available notification for subscribers
